_source: Claude Code v2.1.88 TypeScript source (query.ts, autoCompact.ts, context.ts, microCompact.ts)
_purpose: Golden file of query loop constants for parity testing
synthetic_tool_result_placeholder: [Tool result missing due to internal error]

context_too_long.description: On 413/context_too_long: attempt reactive compact once, then fail if still too long

max_output_tokens.continuation_prompt: Output token limit hit. Resume directly — no apology, no recap...
max_output_tokens.description: First escalate from 8k to 64k, then inject continuation prompts up to 3 times

rate_limit_429.description: Handled by HTTP client retry logic, not query loop

server_5xx.description: Handled by HTTP client retry logic

autocompact.description: Fire when token count >= threshold. Skipped for compact/session_memory/marble_origami query sources.

microcompact.description: Clears content of old tool results. Only affects specific tool types.

stop_conditions.description: Model finished with no tool_use blocks
Context too long after all recovery attempts

tool_execution.description: Read-only tools batched concurrently, mutating tools run one at a time

message_format.missing_result_placeholder: [Tool result missing due to internal error]
message_format.description: Tool results sent as user messages with tool_result content blocks. Every tool_use must have exactly one tool_result.

permission_modes.description: Auto-approve file edits, ask for bash
